info.name: transformation-svc - Local Transform API
info.description: Tests the local-only Flask wrapper (app.py) around erp_transform.orchestrator.transform_only(). This is the Python port of the Postgres transform_payload()/apply_field_transform() functions, exposed as a real HTTP endpoint so it can be exercised from Postman the same way as the SQL RPC endpoint in ../../documentation/postman. Never sends a request to any external/client system -- only reads pipeline config from the local Postgres and returns the transformed JSON body. Start the app first: `python app.py` (port 8000).
